name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
retrieval_text: Credit guarantee cover (not a direct loan) enabling collateral-free lending up to Rs 10 crore for new and existing micro and small enterprises in manufacturing or service activities, excluding agriculture. The Trust guarantees 75-85% of the credit facility depending on borrower category, letting banks and NBFCs extend unsecured or partially secured loans without a third-party guarantee. Requires Udyam Registration; the lending bank charges an Annual Guarantee Fee of roughly 0.37%-1.20% of the guaranteed amount, separate from normal loan interest.
